metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore the fashion industry encompassing design, clothing construction, textile innovation, and sustainable practices. This course develops technical sewing skills, fashion business knowledge, and awareness of the fashion industry's cultural, economic, and environmental impacts.
metadata.general_description: Fashion business, clothing construction, textiles, and sustainable fashion practices.

big_ideas.statement: Fashion is a dynamic form of self-expression, cultural identity, and creative innovation
big_ideas.elaboration: Clothing choices reflect and shape cultural norms, personal identity, and social expression across diverse communities.

big_ideas.statement: The fashion industry creates products through integrated processes of design, production, distribution, and marketing
big_ideas.elaboration: Fashion encompasses multiple stages from concept and materials sourcing through design, manufacturing, retail, and end-of-life management.

big_ideas.statement: Technical skills in clothing construction combine precision, creativity, and problem-solving
big_ideas.elaboration: Quality garment creation requires pattern understanding, sewing technique, fitting knowledge, and attention to detail.

big_ideas.statement: Fashion sustainability addresses environmental, social, and economic impacts of clothing production and consumption
big_ideas.elaboration: The fashion industry faces challenges in reducing waste, ensuring fair labor, managing water and chemical use, and promoting ethical practices.

competencies.raw: Design garments that combine aesthetics, function, and wearability
i_can_statements: I can sketch design concepts and create technical drawings
I can incorporate design principles: balance, proportion, unity
I can design garments suited to body types and lifestyle
I can modify and adapt designs using feedback

competencies.raw: Design clothing business concepts and product lines
i_can_statements: I can develop clothing concepts aligned with market trends
I can create coordinated collections and styling
I can design for target markets and demographics
I can plan sustainable and ethical fashion businesses

competencies.raw: Design construction methods and production processes
i_can_statements: I can plan garment construction sequences
I can design patterns and create pattern grading
I can select appropriate techniques for different fabrics
I can design quality control and finishing processes

competencies.raw: Design sustainable and ethical fashion solutions
i_can_statements: I can select sustainable materials and resources
I can design for durability and longevity
I can create zero-waste or low-waste designs
I can incorporate ethical labor and fair trade principles

competencies.raw: Apply clothing construction and sewing techniques with precision
i_can_statements: I can use sewing equipment and tools safely
I can execute hand and machine sewing techniques
I can apply seams, hems, closures, and details
I can troubleshoot sewing problems and adjust tension

competencies.raw: Apply pattern creation and garment fitting skills
i_can_statements: I can create and modify patterns
I can grade patterns for different sizes
I can fit garments and adjust for individual needs
I can analyze fit problems and make corrections

competencies.raw: Apply textile knowledge to select and use fabrics appropriately
i_can_statements: I can identify fiber content and fabric characteristics
I can select fabrics suited to designs and purposes
I can care for and manipulate different textiles
I can evaluate quality and performance

competencies.raw: Apply fashion business and marketing skills
i_can_statements: I can develop fashion brand concepts
I can price clothing and calculate production costs
I can market fashion products and create promotional materials
I can identify and serve target fashion markets

competencies.raw: Use digital design and computer-aided design tools
i_can_statements: I can use fashion design software
I can create digital sketches and technical drawings
I can use CAD for pattern design
I can visualize designs and color options

competencies.raw: Use technology for pattern grading and production planning
i_can_statements: I can use grading software and systems
I can create size specifications and grade rules
I can plan production sequences and timing
I can estimate material requirements

competencies.raw: Use digital platforms for fashion business and marketing
i_can_statements: I can use e-commerce platforms for selling fashion
I can create digital fashion marketing content
I can leverage social media for fashion promotion
I can manage fashion business operations digitally

competencies.raw: Use multimedia to showcase fashion designs and portfolios
i_can_statements: I can photograph and style garments professionally
I can create digital fashion portfolios
I can produce fashion videos and lookbooks
I can present designs and concepts effectively

areas.name: Fashion Design and Sketching
topics: Design principles and color theory application

areas.name: Fashion Industry and Sustainable Practice
topics: Fashion industry structure and global supply chains
